Is this the final Stranger Things?
Is this it?
Has it been quite emotional?
I know you can't really tell us how it ends then, but like you reading those scripts and going through it and stuff, was it just.
Well, I haven't read the end.
I know what happens to my character.
Um, because I kind of forced myself into the writers room.
Um, so you broke in and found out?
Yes.
Basically I messaged the directors and thought, can I come over and have a meeting with you?
And then I came over and then there was a whiteboard.
So you've written your own ending?

@ptoothfish why do all of the kids’ IMDb headshots look like they’re screen grabs from This Person Does Not Exist dot com? 😬

@bloodflowersburning yup the whole production machine is giving uncanny valley
even if they are real kids underneath, i wonder how much tuning up their images get 😬
smiles widened, dimples accentuated, etc
i stand by my assertion they will be treated like hot-swappable parts if they do anything complicated like have an opinion or grow into their faces wrong

@ptoothfish oh they absolutely will. There’s probably even some contract clauses that lands them in deep weta if they even sneeze wrong.

source_doc:
i am hesitant to declare it but i may be right around the point of behavior calculation optimization where there's nothing more that can be done without actually decimating the number of paths being processed.
And that might actually be the play because things like UCT are smarter about traversing a tree with a budget and splitting how deep vs broad you go

at the end of the day, it's always going to be possible that some enemy picks up some combination of abilities/items where the combinatorial explosion of possibility space is unable to calculate fast on any hardware, so I was always going to need to cap it somewhere, just that theoretical cap is now 40x bigger than it was in january

Welp think I'm going to implement UCT because my game's just Go now this is going to be a journey

Sò un po' indeciso a dichiaralo, ma forsi só prop de la fase d'ottimizzazione di calcolo del comportamento, und l'é na roba che 'l pò mé no 'n fa' senza decimì la quantità de sentieri che vien processà.
E che forsi l'é propi la mossa, perché robè come UCT é piü intelligenti a traversé na árbol con un budget e a spartì com chëe profònd vs largh che va

Alla fine de la giurnè, l'é sempre posible che quarch nemic prenda na combinaziun de abilità/items und la libera esplosione de l'espazi de possibilità é incapaz de calcolé veloç su qualsiasi hardware, así che j'ò sempre devé de mette na limita, chësta limita teorica é mo 40x piü granda che l'era a janér

Uff, pens che vöi implementé UCT perché la me partìda é mo Go, chësta sarà na viagi

source_doc:
@hacks4pancakes What do you think is actually going on?
Confused? Anxious? Executive Dysfunction? Unrealistic? Bone idle?
(I'm NOT confusing ND with idleness in my internal ontology here, but I wonder if either might be contributing...)

@hacks4pancakes @DamonHD Foe emigration at least, I can imagine myself saying “oh I’m so jealous, I would LOVE to do that” when the truth is there are internal or external reasons why I wouldn’t/couldn’t and someone offering to help me with the logistics wouldn’t change that so I politely decline.

@darryl @hacks4pancakes The grown-up way to politely decline would be "I got ahead of myself: I cannot do that for other reasons much as I'd like to", not brushing it off as a diary issue!

hypo_0:
@hacks4pancakes Cëra pensëtes che 'l stà succedendo?
Confus? Ansios? Disfunziun Executive? Irreal? Vëda a bòn?
(Nò confundëi ND cun la viziun interna che hëi chi, ma m’interèssa se un de chëi do pò esè contributi...)

@hacks4pancakes @DamonHD Per l'emigrazion al manco, me orèi dir "oh, so gelos, vorìa tant fà chëi" quand la verità è che ci sunt motivi interni o esterni par i quali nò 'l potrei e gnìun che me aiùda cun i logìstich nò cambia chëi, alura me ricuso cun gentilezza.

@darryl @hacks4pancakes La manera da gran de ricusé cun gentilezza saria "m’ò spostè scun't l'era: nò 'l podìa fà per altri motivi anca se m’ë piacerìa tant", nò scotend l'còma come un problema da diari!

source_doc:
@Edent ah, interesting - was the Hub 5 something you had to request from Virgin, or did you just get one elsewhere and set it up? (As per recent discussion was issued with a 5x, with its lack Modem Mode.)

@yvan I already had the Hub 4. I went onto their online chat and whinged about poor download speeds until they sent me a new Hub.
If you're on the XPON network, I don't think you have a choice though.

@Edent ah yeah, just been trying to do some research, but it's all a bit muddy... I'm FTTP/XGS-PON so I think just stuck with the 5x... not an insurmountable problem, just a little annoying. (But compared to unreliable <40mpbs BT rotting fenland copper that cost me more than Virgin... I'm not really complaining.)

source_doc:
Ironing the lightweight green corduroy for my first try at the Sachi's Studio Newsboy Cap pattern. I don't know how I feel about the recommendation to use interfacing but it probably does want something to stiffen and thicken it a bit.
#millinery

Sachi's newsboy cap pattern advises to cut the crown pieces diagonal to the weave ("on the bias") to allow more stretch around the circumference but that will make the corduroy rows run aslant, where I prefer them vertical.
We shall see. This is the test cookie to get a feel for the pattern. I like corduroy for texture but green wouldn't be my first choice, and this fabric is lightweight enough that I should add a layer, whether interfacing or what-have-you from the stash.

On a second look, my fabric isn't corduroy at all, it's just velvet, so I can cut at 45° to the fabric weave like Sachi suggests in the Newsboy Cap pattern and it won't look strange.
#millinery

Stiro il corduroy verde legger per la mia prima prova col modello del cappello Newsboy de Sachi. Non so come mi sento riguardo al consiglio de usar l'interfaccia, ma probabilmente l'è bisognia de quarch cosa per indurì e ingrossè un po'.
#cappelleria

Il modello del cappello Newsboy de Sachi consiglia de tagliar i pezzi de la corona in diagonale rispetto al tessuto ("sul bias") per permetter più elasticità attorno alla circonferenza, ma quest farà correre le righe del corduroy di sbieco, dove io le preferisco verticali.
Vedremo. Questa è la biscotto de prova per comprendere il modello. Mi piace il corduroy per la texture, ma il verde non saria la mia prima scelta, e sto tessuto l'è leggero abbastanza che dovrì aggiunger una strato, sia l'interfaccia o quach altra cosa dal stash.

Guardando un'altra volta, il mio tessuto non è affatto corduroy, è solo velluto, quindi posso tagliare a 45° rispetto al tessuto come suggerisce Sachi nel modello del cappello Newsboy e non sembrerà strano.
#cappelleria

source_doc:
Whoa, you mean Blender Market, the thing I said was the first step towards the Blender environment becoming a shitty subscription service, renamed itself to the oh-so-appealing name "Superhive" and then decided to mandate subscriptions?
WHOA WHO COULD HAVE GUESSED?! Not me, that's for sure. This is completely out of left field!

TBH, I have never seen a single company with "Hive" in the name that wasn't a complete shitshow run by assholes, so I never bought anything on that platform -
Sorry
I didn't RENT anything on that platform if I could help it.
Maybe it's unfair, but "clearly we, a company that specializes in connecting creators with their audience, should name ourselves HIVE, because the creators are just our loyal little bees, and audience is our loyal little bees, work for us!" always gives me bad vibes.

"Hive implies busy crowds!"
Hive implies a queen.

source_doc:
@Maker_of_Things
Is there any bruising or swelling? If it’s swelling then let the practice know and keep an eye on it.
Assuming she took it from the veins around the elbow, theres a chance she went too deep and hit the back wall of the vein, and an underlying tendon then bruised it on the way out. All depends on technique and equipment. I could never get the hang of a fixed needle draw but was a deft hand at a butterfly draw, you could be much kinder.
Hope it’s eased now.

@tempusfelix
Yeah, from my elbow. It is still sore, but getting better. No bruising or bleeding though.

@Maker_of_Things
Good. She may well have been too deep so remember if they’re not urgent, you can often ask for a specific practitioner if your surgery allows it. For example I like the sister at mine, she’s so smooth.

hypo_0:
@Maker_of_Things
É da debröi o de swell? Se l'é swell, alura dà avís a la pratica e tegn l'öcc.
Se la l'é ciampata da le vene de l'elb, ghe é la probabilità che jé và 'ndò tropen e l'é stà a percò uè la vène, e un tendon de sota l'é ciampà durante la saída. Tot depènde da la tècnica e dal strümént. I é mai rivà a fà un’estrazione cun la siringa ferma, ma i é stai bón cun la siringa a farfalla, tu potes èssar plü gentile.
Sperem che l'é migliurà mo adès.

@tempusfelix
Sì, da l'mé elb. L'é ancora doloré, ma l'é mejoré. No debröi o sanguin però.

@Maker_of_Things
Ben. È probabile che jé sia andada trop in fond, alura regòrde che se no jé urgents, te pœs spesse domandé per un practitioner specific se la tó operaziun la permet. Per esempi, a mi me pias la sora de la mé, l'é tant dolze.

source_doc:
@theynege As someone who was aware of dansup (bc of you and some other folks) but hadn't witnessed it happen in real time, this time I witnessed it in real time and it was a piece of work. Polished. Like he's a habitual offender.

@theynege he screenshotted her account and posted it with his "crazy mask lady" comments, when called out he IMMEDIATELY deleted the posts and started posting his bona fides as a "community builder" and all the folks he's worked with and and and wow, isn't he amazing no acknowledgement at all that he - community builder and dude with marginalized identities and all - targeted a disabled racialized woman online for harassment by doing it.
The sniper quality of it was something to behold. He was ready to tell everyone how great he was to cover over basically an attack he knew could bring harm.

@quietmarc @theynege that post was like an ableism hat trick

source_doc:
I'm doing a eekly 1hr meeting where I'm going over with a director of engineering my soap box on managing a product management organization and actually it's coming out to be a pretty good episodic thing

Topics have been
- different types of product managers and the basic skill sets in developing requirements
- how product managers ensure an ongoing cadence for an engineering team
- dealing with product managers with varying backgrounds (engineering, data analyst, operational SME, consulting etc)
what's been fun is that this Director and I worked at a previous company with product managers that I didn't manage and I'm able to reference "hey remember that person? that person was awesome and here's why."

so in various email chains and slack threads I'll forward them to said director (if he's already not in there) and be like "ok a GOOD product manager would do THIS" and a "BAD product maanger would do THAT" rememember when so and so did THIS? that was good.

hypo_0:
Stò faiend un'incontro de 1 ora a la s'cadenza de vörc, indove vö pervegn cun un direttur de ingegneria sul mè soap box su comà gestir na organisasiun de gestiun di prodotti e in realitat al sta turnè ind un bel episodic.

J'argoments sun stà
- diferènt tip de gestùrs de prodotti e i basich sets de competenzes per sviluppé requisits
- comè che i gestùrs de prodotti as aseguren na cadence contínua per un team de ingegneria
- gestì cun gestùrs de prodotti cun vari background (ingegneria, analista de dati, SME operativ, consulènza, ecc)
l'è stà divertent che sto direttur e i àn lavorè a n'antra azienda cun gestùrs de prodotti che i nen ài gestì e jò sò adbò a fà riferimento "hei, t'ramembri de quel? quel èra fantastic e a l'è stà per quela rasòn".

Alòra in vari catene de mail e thread de slack i m'ò forwarding a sto direttur (se l'è mìa già là) e alòra dirò "ok un BUN gestùr de prodotti faret QUESTO" e un "MAL gestùr de prodotti faret QUELLO" t'ramembri quand so e che al fè THIS? chel èra bù.

source_doc:
@rechelon extremely unpopular is one way of putting it… i don’t live in berlin but i think people everywhere had roughly the same response, which is “fuck these assholes for doing something that leaves so many uninvolved people without electricity and treating it like necessary collateral damage”. I’ve seen lots of people speculate that it was a false flag to make the left look bad. Not that the cops care, they are probably giddy with excitement now (a gross thing to imagine) that they have a pretense to raid and criminalize the leftist scene.

@enby_of_the_apocalypse
Yeah, I mean it seems like there's still about half a dozen anticivs raised on meme accounts who are shocked the scene didn't stand with them, but are extremely shocked that old timer anticivs who felt disrespected by said crew and haven't backed them.

@enby_of_the_apocalypse
I do worry that we'll see a self-justification spiral where a handful of anticivs get so mad at the movement for not supporting their super based attack on the civilized that they end up in ITS level shit within a year or two of isolation and seething.

hypo_0:
@rechelon estremament unpopular é na manera da metterlo… iò non abito a berlino ma pensë che la jënta nësc lë stess rispuosta, che é “fottë sti strunìs per ave na roba che deixa tantë jënta senza elettricità e la tratta come danno collaterale necessari”. A vëdë tantë jënta specula che é stà un falso bandiera per fare che la sinistra pare mal. Non che i poliziesc ghe ne freghin, l'é probabel che sòn gazy con entusiasme adess (na roba brutta da imaginà) che a ghèn na scusa per razziare e crimalizà la scena sinistrèra.

@enby_of_the_apocalypse
Eh sì, par che a l’é ancora circa na meza dozzina de anticivs sollevê su conti de meme che s’han shockê per la scena che non stà cun é, ma sòn estremament shockê che i anticivs de vecia generazion che s’ëren sentî rispettu ad da sô squadra e non ûn sostegn ad é.

@enby_of_the_apocalypse
A jë preocupe che vëdë un spirale de auto-giustificaziun dove na manada de anticivs se fâ tantë furiosi col movimento per non supportè il sò attacch super basad a che la civiltà che finiscen ad ès in situazion de mëns la merda in un ann o do de isolamento e rancor.

A ve dë tantë jënta speculà che é stà un falso bandiera per far paré mal la sinistra. Non che ai poliziesc ghe ne freghin, l'é probabel che sòn gazy de entusiasme adess (na roba brutta da imaginà) perchë a ghèn na scusa per razziare e crimalizà la scena sinistrèra.

@enby_of_the_apocalypse

source_doc:
I wish alcohol wasn't such a normal gift in society 😅 My employer sent me a bottle of eggnog but the only alcohol we like is in alcohol markers

I guess "not liking it" is kinda poor wording, I just think it's weird how casual we are with this stuff and we somehow just assume that all adults love this shit when there's people who shouldn't be touching it ever, and frankly I think the world would be better off if I poured it into the toilet than even gifting it to someone

@doombloomart
I have had US Big Corp required sensitivity training that reminds people not everyone wants alcohol and it's inappropriate to ask why. Seems like that should be more common

@elithebearded Yeah, that's mostly what I wish for too. I get that with sending random shit to a whole corporation will never be inoffensive to everyone, but 1. don't send random shit to a whole corporation maybe and 2. alcohol just rubs me wrong in the way that many who shouldn't touch it may touch it when it randomly shows up at the doorstep. 😅

hypo_0:
Vëi che l'alcool n'ës è un regala tant normal dla società 😅 Me patrò me à mandé na bottiglia de eggnog, ma l'unica roba che n'ëi jë pià é in marcadors d'alcool.

Pensi che "non jë pià" é na parola tant poara, ma pensi che l'é stranu cómo n'sem vëci prà ai chëi robas e n'ëi jë da mandé che tuts l'òmes a aman chëi cazzi, quëi che ghe n'ëi, e m'ën dis che l món sarebbe mej se jë lo versé ne toilet che da dàl a quëi.

@doombloomart
Ho avù un cors de sensibilità richiesto da na grand azienda americana che alëg la gent che n'ëi tüt jë vëi l'alcool e che l'é inapropiada chë domandé perché. Pare che ciò dui consì téss più comum.

@elithebearded Sì, quëi é lança che vëi anca jë. Capëi che mándé robas a cas a na grand azenda n'é mai inoffensiv per tüt, ma 1. non mandé robas a cas a na grand azienda forsa e 2. l'alcool me dà fastidi de moëz che tanti che n'ëi dovrëbben nè tocà lo tocán quë quando l'é a chë böt. 😅

King: we're not

Musk:
Musk: mama mia you contradicta me?
Musk: maybe you a pedophile

Musk: lika my boy you know he very based
Musk: you shoulda introduce himma to your boy
King: i don't think so
Musk: mama mia itsa great idea!!

@bitterkarella
King [chuckling]: Hello, Very Based. I'm Steve.
Very Based Musk: Hi, Steve. I'm very impressed you got my name right away, most people need it explained.
King: Wha, I thought I was making a joke.

source_doc:
Traction meets fashion: The best weatherproof trainers for rain-slicked pavements

The Cloudhorizon Waterproof feels purpose-built for the stop-start rhythm of winter commuting. Its lightweight waterproof upper keeps your feet dry without adding bulk, and the shoe's smooth rocker shape helps you roll forward easily, even when you're layered up and carrying heavy loads.

Underfoot, Helion foam creates a cushioned bounce that softens long walks between stations, while the grippy rubber outsole keeps things steady on wet steps and shiny tiles. The pared-back design gives it a polished, modern look, ideal if you prefer a trainer that handles lousy weather subtly, without shouting its technical credentials.

Traziun s’incontra cun la moda: I mei trainers resistents a l’ura per paviments bagnats

Il Cloudhorizon Waterproof para fàt per il ritme stop-start de la commuting d’inverno. La sò parte superiore leggera e resistente all’acqua t'heim sèc senza aumenter la massa, e la forma liscia a rocker dla scarpë t’üta rollar avant cun facilità, anca quan che te es copert cun panni e t’portes pes anti.

Sota il pè, la schiuma Helion crea un rimbalzo cuscioné che ammorbidiss i lunghi percorsi tra le stazions, mentre l’suola de gomma antiscivolosa t’heim in stabilità su scalini bagnats e piastres lucide. Il design semplificà la dà un aspètt lucido e modern, ideàl se te preferes una scarpa che gestisce l'ura mal sorts de manera subtil, senza strillè i sü tecnici credentials.

2026-03-23 Hum The X-Men Animated Series Theme To Yourself: Unfortunately, this leaves me at square one. The makeup of the plant matter is similar to the surrounding area. Any of the various creates that pass through here could have easily urinated in just that area, but the amount of animal traffic would make it difficult to narrow suspects.
3/
#SpookyKittiesSciences

2026-03-23 Hum The X-Men Animated Series Theme To Yourself: Inspector Clouseau did not roll around in the area from what I could tell, but he did stop in the spot for around a minute. It is too far away from any of my cameras to tell exactly what he was doing, but movement suggests sniffing around.
4/
#SpookyKittiesSciences

2026-03-23 Hum The X-Men Animated Series Theme To Yourself: Whatever X22 was doing, I don't believe he is the reason everyone is interested. I have only found 1 additional The Inspector visit to the spot the day before. The camera recording the area only keeps the most recent 100GB, so I only have a limited time frame to check. So far, I have found no other traffic during the day. While secret kitty traffic at night is a possibility, it is unlikely.
6/
#SpookyKittiesSciences

2026-03-23 Hum The X-Men Animated Series Theme To Yourself: Sfortunadament, chest a me lascia a l'iniz. La composiziun de la materia vegetala é simila a l'area che la circonda. Qualunque di i varii creati che passa chi podesse aver pisciato in prope chel loc, ma la quantita de trafic animali l'é faria dificil a restringer i sospett.
3/
#GatSpaventosiScienzi

4/

source_doc:
Progress after a while off. I got the sewing machine out to do the bill and a crown seam. Half the crown sewn plus the bill, resting atop the paper form made from the pattern. I had to rip and re-sew the machine stitch because I pinned along instead of across the seam and went off track. I might re-do the bill if I want a little more depth.
#millinery

Eight crown panels and two bill panels assembled into three pieces and pinned for general shape. Sachi's Studio Newsboy Cap pattern in green velvet. Mostly machine stitched.
The pattern calls for topstitching along the seams of the crown panels, which might suggest either matching or contrasting thread.
#millinery

Top view before I sew the crown halves together. Reviewing the how-to video. I see Sachi is using a few tiny spring clips during sewing instead of pinning the whole seam.

A bit of a messy join on the eight panels coming together at the peak of the newsboy cap, so I am thinking a larger button may be in order to disguise the seams.

Crown fully pieced, with cloth covered.button at peak. Raw edges loosely tucked under. Seams neither pressed nor topstitched.
#millinery

hypo_0:
Progress après un peu de temps. Ai tiré fora la mašina da cusì per fazer la scossa e una seam da coron. Meta de la coron cusida plus la scossa, che reposé sur la forma de papier fata dal patron. Dëvèi straziar e re-cusir la cucitura de la mašina perchè ai dré ben plàzà a l'odòra instead de l'ìdà. Ai podèi re-far la scossa se voì un poc de più profundità.
#millinery

Ot panèls de coron e doi panèls de scossa assembladi in tre pezz e pinzadi per forma generela. Patron da cappèl de newsboy de Sachi in vellut verd. Principalmente cusì a mašina.
El patron chiede de cusir lungo i seams di panèls de coron, che podarè suggerir o de fil abbiné o contrastant.
#millinery

Vista de dritt avant de cusir insèma les metà de coron. Rivegnì el video de come fè. Vedi che Sachi usa un po' de clip primp mansi durànt la cusidura invece de pinzar tuta la seam.

Un po’ de disordiné al join dei ot panèls che vegna insèma a la punta del cappèl de newsboy, cusì pensi che un bottone più grande podría èsser utile per disfar el seam.

Coron completament assemblé, con un bottone coperto da stoffa a la punta. Bordes crúi pöch insott. Seam né premudi né cusidi de cima.
#millinery

source_doc:
Tinkering with my stereo system this week has got me thinking about an oddity that I've never been able to get to the bottom of...let's see if the Mastodon hive mine can help.
The amp is a Philips FA454 and the CD Player is a Philips CD150.
According to the amp manual I can connect the units with a "8-pole DIN to 5-pole DIN + 2 x single-pole CINCH" cable."
I take this to mean an 8 pin din to a 5 pin + stereo RCA cable...which sounds cursed.
Never been able to find one. Can anyone make one?

The service manual for the amp is nice and clear (picture 2 in above toot), but I can't find anything as nice for the CD player. I've attached a picture (picture 4 in the above toot) from the service manual that I *think* is the relevant section.
Currently I have the CD player hooked up with just the RCA cables and it all works fine, but if I could find/make the correct Din to Din + RCA cable then I could use some additional functionality and free up the only RCA stereo inputs on my amp.

There's a repair café this weekend in the town where I live...if I'm still puzzling over it all by then I might take it all along there and see if they can help me hack together a cable.

Tinkin cun me stereo stema chest'ans ha' sbutà a pensé a na stranezza che nunca son riva a capì... vedem se la setera Mastodon me pô dar na man.
El amplificator é un Philips FA454 e el lettor CD é un Philips CD150.
Secònd el manual de l'amplificator, puedo conèter i dispositivs cun n cabl "8-pole DIN a 5-pole DIN + 2 x single-pole CINCH".
La interpretem come un cabl 8 pin din a un 5 pin + cabl stereo RCA... che para un po' maledet.
Mai son riva a trovarne un. Qualc'ün pê podé farne un?

El manual de servìzi per l'amplificator é belo e clar (foto 2 in su l'toot), ma nu trovo gnente de tanto bel per el lettor CD. A g'ho attaché na foto (foto 4 in su l'toot) dal manual de servìzi che *pense* sia la sezione pertinenta.
Adè, g'ho el lettor CD conecté cun só i cavi RCA e tot funziona ben, ma se se podessi trovar/far el cabl giüst da Din a Din + RCA podesse utilizzar anc un poc de funcionalità in pi e liberé i unici ingressi RCA stereo su me amplificator.

Chest weekend gh'é un café de riparazion in la tchè da che viv la... se son enco' a pensér a tut chest, peutìr porté tot là e vèdé se l'ain pô aiuté a fâ un cabl.

source_doc:
@kagan Just use anything, even the cashier receipts from your grocery shopping - whatever you want. A friend of mine who exhibits a lot put a sheet of toilet roll from every place he's exhibiting in his scrapbook another friend got injured while hanging her frames and eventually used the cast from the injury and some gouache to stamp patters on the pages. Hence: everything's involved you want involved.

@aurora And then you... take all these things, and glue, staple, or otherwise attach them into a book? Is that it?
I'm unclear on what happens next, or why.
Honestly, I may just not be a scrapbooking person.

@kagan Yes, that's exactly the way to go! Intentionally spill your coffee, drop an ink cartridge... whatever suits you. One just needs to get all these fancy ideas shown on pinterest or whatever out of one's head. It's about documenting the process instead of being a visual dainty. Use it like a wrecking journal if that suits. It's totally up to the person who makes it.

hypo_0:
@kagan A l'é da bën che d'ëspietà, üna ügner, anca i scontrini del supermercat - quel che te vö. Un amigë meu che espòrt da l long a messo üna foglia de rotlö da cesso da n'ogni lòch indë lë so scrapbook, un'otra amigë l'è stàta infortedëda dô be nën hëder a so cadre e anke à usè la gessura da l'infortün e qualch gouache pa stampé i mottif in d'le pagine. Quindi: tote le cos chë tu vö che s'ciapë.

@aurora E po te... t'prëi töt chëi coss, e li grefë, e li fane, o de qualchec d'ötr manera i in un liber? L'è què?
Non jë sapa mé n'cò che succedë dâ po, o per qué.
A dir la verità, forzë n'jé n'è bën gënaün de scrapbooking.

@kagan Sì, l'é esat ciò che jé da fè! Spilla intentionàlmente la tò caffè, falë n'cartôtt d'inchiostro... quel che te gusta. Rèsta da tirê fòra di ma tête töt chëi belle idee chë si vëdë su pinterest o quel che l'é. L'é 'n quëst la documentation del process, e no de èsser 'na visual dainty. Usèl comë 'n wrecking journal se l'é giò. L'é tutë su la persòna chë lo fa.

source_doc:
@afewbugs I have seen this too, I do worry that new members might not find such groups in the real world now as they are less likely to be on old fashioned social media. For instance someone was trying to give away two pedal cycles in need of repair and couldn't get any interest through Facebook. A few years ago they wouldn't have lasted ten minutes before someone claimed them. I have one and I am gutted that I wasn't able to take the second. Similarly, litter picking and community gardens.

@hicksy2 @afewbugs I have more luck shifting things through Facebook marketplace these days than I do with Gumtree any more, and I can't face eBay for things too big to post. Possibly it depends a lot on where you are though, especially with bikes!

@lnr @hicksy2 Marketplace is a big one keeping me on Facebook too. I used to think it was to keep in touch with friends but I barely see any posts from my actual friends anymore, so now it's mostly marketplace, local groups and the fact most local businesses and even the Library only seem to have their opening times, special events etc on Facebook

@afewbugs An vëi che ài vëdü anca ie, m'ëst preocupé che i nœv membri podëst no truà tals grups in chëre world real adess, dan che i èn men probabié d'ëssere su social media vieux. Par esempi, cëna jëra un che provéva a dà via du pedal cykli chë n'aveva bisögn d'ön repàra e no l'à pudü troà nisun interes su Facebook. Un pa de an indietr, lë s'an avri da jëra durà gnüna desminüts prima che quëscün lë reclamèss. Ëi à n'jé e son èd ën cœr che no ài podü plante la segonda. Tegnèra, cëna da raccoglhe i rifiuti e i giardin comunitari.

@hicksy2 @afewbugs Ài plü sorte a sposté la robba su Facebook marketplace adess che con Gumtree, e no m'ëst missé d'andé su eBay par robba massa granda par spedi. Forse depënd de tant daonde te se troë, specialment con le bici!

@lnr @hicksy2 Marketplace é jë na gran co e me ten su Facebook anca. A pensèva che l'era par stà in contat cun i amìs, ma adèss vedëi quasi gnüna posta da i mè vëri amìs, par chë i é la magiöra part marketplace, grupi locai e il fat chë la màs part di negòzi locai e anca la biblioteca parësen avëi su Facebook gnüda în l'ora di apertura, eventi speciali ecc.

source_doc:
Tonight in #MMRPG! My back finally shuts up enough that I can GM again as the heroes continue their search for the missing girl Cammie. Vega the Digital Dragon surprises a trio of mischievous scamps who snuck into her arcade in the middle of the night but one of them recognizes her as a town superhero and they end up having a heartwarming moment geeking out over video games. Unfortunately, the moment is interrupted by somebody or something landing on the roof of the arcade... 1/?

Vega goes to investigate and finds Dr. Vesper, in his monstrous bat form that the press has dubbed the "Gargoyle Man," along with a harpy-like creature that Vesper describes as his "little protegee." Vesper says that they have come to introduce themselves and invite Vega to join their society of man-creature misfits that is led by "The Madame," Dr. Diana Laughton of the Laughton Institute. 2/?

Vega buys some time to get the mischievous scamps out of the arcade and call the rest of the Mythics for backup, then plays along at being interested in joining this "new family." Vesper and Harpy (who does not speak once during the interaction) lead Vega to a ship in the harbor, where the Laughton Institute appears to be packing up their things... presumably because they know they're drawing attention from Agent Carter and A.R.G.E.N.T. among others. 3/?

hypo_0:
Oe stasera in #MMRPG! La me schiena la smette enfin de far rumur che podi GM again mentre i eroi continúan la so ricerca dla périca mancante Cammie. Vega, el Dragon Digital, surprende un trio de scamps mischivous che ié entrè in so arcade in mez de la noce, ma un de lora la riconosce come la supereroina dl paes e i finie in un momento emozionant a geeking out su i videojocs. Purtroppo, el momento el vegn interrot per qualcuno o qualcosa che atterrè sul tettu de l'arcade... 1/?

Vega la va a investigar e la trova Dr. Vesper, in so mostruos form de pipistrella che la stampa l'à nominè "el Gargoyle Man," insema a na creatura che la somègna a una harpy che Vesper la descrive come so "picéla proteggida." Vesper el dis che i son vegnì a presentar sé e a invità Vega a unirse a so società de misfits uomo-creatura ch'la è guidada da "La Madame," Dr. Diana Laughton dl Laughton Institute. 2/?

Vega la compra un poc de temp per tirà fora i scamps mischivous dl arcade e chiamà i rest dl Mythics per aiuto, e pò la s'fa interessar a unirse a sta "neva faméa." Vesper e Harpy (che la dis nol s'ün pù durante l'interazzione) i ngen ve a un bastiment in port, dove el Laughton Institute il pare che l'é a pacà i so coss... presumibilmente perché i sa ch'i stà a pèrd l'attenzione de l'Agent Carter e A.R.G.E.N.T. tra l'ater. 3/?

source_doc:
My brother in He-Who-Shall-Not-Be-Named, what you are describing is a consequence of _misogyny_, not "misandry."

I desperately need men to realize that just because it's directed at them and an actual serious problem doesn't mean it is "misandry."
Just saw someone describe being discriminated against _for being considered effeminate_ as "misandry" and I just.

It's not that you aren't experiencing something real. You very well may be. But it isn't "misandry." Because "misandry" doesn't exist.
Yes, this applies to trans men as well. "Transmisandry" _also_ isn't a thing and just contributes to anti-feminist narratives. It treats itself as a mirror of transmisogyny, but transmisogyny is _intersective_: we experience transphobia _and_ we experience misogyny _and_ we experience this unholy thing that happens when the two interact. It's not a subset, even an exclusive subset, it's an intersection.
But the following all are absolutely problems that can be talked about!
* Transphobia/Transmisia
* Antitransmasculity
* Transemasculation
* Misogyny
It sucks to be discriminated against, but the language that we use is so, so important here.

Me frëd é He-Who-Shall-Not-Be-Named, che t'ö descriv é na consequenza de _misoginia_, no "misandria."

Ho d'üra bisögn che i òmens se rendan cont che just che l'é direzionà contra lü e l'é na vera e seria problema, no völ dì che l'é "misandria."
Ài just vëdü qualcun che descriva de vegnì discriminà _per vëgnì considerà efeminà_ come "misandria" e jë just.

Non é che tú no stai vivendo qualcos real. Tú pòst ben che te stai. Ma no é "misandria." Perché "misandria" no esiste.
Sì, che jë vëi anche ai òmens trans. "Transmisandria" _anca_ no é na roba e contribües a narrazioni anti-femministe. Tràtes lë stess come 'n specchio de transmisoginia, ma la transmisoginia é _intersectiva_: noi vëdëm transphobia _e_ noi vëdëm misoginia _e_ noi vëdëm questa cosa indegna che sucede quandi i dü s'interactë. No é na sottocategoria, nemm un'esclusiva sottocategoria, l'é 'n'incrocio.
Ma i seguenti sun absolutament problemi che pò n'è parlar!
* Transphobia/Transmisia
* Antitransmasculinità
* Transemasculaziun
* Misoginia
É penoso essè discriminà, ma la lenga che ne usé é tal, tal importante chi.

source_doc:
:redpanda: sometimes people will ask us like "what if you got a publisher for [game] wouldn't that be wicked?" but the problem is that all that would have to go through our game director, Ashe, who's said she wont speak to any publisher who doesn't address her as Ashe
the second she gets "Jess" the deal ends

:redpanda: and in a world where like, not even the AI slop publishers sending AI emails, but the people who have been flat out rude and some of them like, you could *feel* the misogyny dripping off their email, we're not really interested in talking to any of them lol

:redpanda: (I will shout out the publishers who have reached out to us though who have been like "here's some of the games we've published" and, out of their catalog, they picked out exclusively furry games. at least they did their homework)

:redpanda: anyways if you ever were like "I don't understand why Blobun isn't on switch? it'd be a perfect fit" that's why, and we can't afford the devkit and version of gamemaker that does that export, so yea you gotta go steam deck (or x86-ARM converter on those anbernics) if you want it on the go

source_doc:
@hannorein@mastodon.social sooo, we’re tagging verified human content now for them to have a dataset with less slop to train on?
I don’t know, they should asphyxiate from their own barfed up slop mess they’ve created until their latent vector space converges to unity.

@helpsterTee @hannorein My first thought as well. I killed off my personal site since I didn't want to feed the various Torment Nexuses. Marking genuine human content just makes building new, unpoisoned and slop free data sets easier.
I thought about doing the opposite and building a "poison pot" for AI crawlers but my poor little server is not that beefy.

@CodingPhysicist@mstdn.social @hannorein@mastodon.social yeah, if we suffer, let them suffer.
If your employer stuffs AI in your daily routine, instead of resigning, use malicious compliance and apply it to totally mundane problems and embrace slightly-wrong answers while burning through corporate token credit to ruin quarterly performance.
I’m so fed up with this and they’re using it anyways against us, so let’s have a little fun, while we can 🫤
Edit: they’re making up numbers all the time and faking profits for a while now, the usage that’ll bankrupt your employer won’t place a dent at slop headquarters unprofitable scam business anyways or their forest burning slopetuum mobile.

hypo_0:
@hannorein@mastodon.social quindi, adess stém taggando contenù uman verificà per che lü ciapa n dataset cun mèn slop per sü trené?
No sé, dovrèssan asfissià da lôr stes sgarbà ch'èn fàt fin che lôr spazi de vëctur latent 'l s'cunverja a unità.

@helpsterTee @hannorein Anca l me prima pensada. Aiò tirà fora la me pagina persoanle perché non vöia da nutrì i vari Torment Nexus. Marké contenù uman genuin l fà più fàcil da custruì nova dataset senza tòxiche e senza slop.
Aiò pensado de fà l’oppost e custruì 'n "poison pot" per i crawler AI ma l me povèr server l é miga tant robust.

@CodingPhysicist@mstdn.social @hannorein@mastodon.social eh, se no fem soffrì, laséss ad lór soffrì.
Se l tò datur de lavòr l'inseré AI in la tò rutina, invez de resignà, üsa conformità maligna e aplicala a problematiche totalmente mundane e abbràcia risposte poc èròni pur iniziando a bruciar 'l token de l'aziénda per rovinà la performance trimestrale.
Son stanco de chest e l'üsa anyway contra de nüs, quindi divertìssom un pò, fin che n' é posible 🫤
Edit: l’fàn n' timbro de nòm all'òra e fàn profìt finti da già un pò, l'üso che bankruptarà l tò datur de lavòr non farà nissun dânt en la slop headquarters de l'affare miga profìtèvel o în loro slopetuum mobile che brüsa i bosch.

Aiò pensà de fà l’oppost e custruì 'n "poison pot" per i crawler AI ma l me povèr server non é tant robust.

@CodingPhysicist@mstdn.social @hannorein@mastodon.social eh, se no fem soffrì, lasséss lór soffrì.
Se l tò datur de lavòr l insere AI in la tò rutina, invez de resignà, üsa conformità maligna e aplicala a problematiche mundane e accetta risposte un po’ sbagliè mentre brüsa n poco de token de l'aziénda per rovinà la performance trimestrale.
Son stanco de chest e l'üsa anyway contra de nüs, quindi divertìssom un po', fin che l'é possibile 🫤
Edit: l’fàn num de nòm constante e fàn profìt finti da un pò, l'üso che bankruptarà l tò datur de lavòr non farà nissun danno en la slop headquarters de l'affare miga profìtèvel o en l loro slopetuum mobile ch’brüsa i bosch.

source_doc:
@la Isn't rule #1 of machining that if you haven't faced it off, it's not square or flat?

@azonenberg yes, of course, but I *did* mean to face it off. I just had my tool zero set wrong.
Because I assumed that it was roughtly flat.
I'm making an extra part today. I have the stock. And if I don't it will bug me to no end. Plus, during test fitting the bearing I broke the glue holding the part on my plate, so I would have to indicate it back in anyways, which I don't wanna dooooo, so.....

@la I know the feeling.
Had a similar problem when working on my house where literally every datum you might think of using was wrong.
I had a contractor frame a door frame plumb and square. Had to rip out a couple of studs after he left because the door needed to be like a degree off level in order to be flush with the floor and not floating in the air on one side.
Another (partial height) wall has each stud carefully cut to length because no two are the same size... The floor isn't flat so to make the countertop level you need the wall to be a parallelogram rather than a rectangle

@la L regola #1 de la lavorazion a l'é che se no l'hai faceé fora, no l'é né quadré né plan?

@azonenberg ié, naturalmente, ma i *veo* che l'éra de faceé fora. L'aveva cuma l'utensile zerà mal.
Perché i pensava che l'éra liscj.
Oe, stó fabricando en part extra. Ié la materiāla. E se no la fasso, mi darà fastidi fin a l'infinit. Plus, durand el test de messa à punto del cuscinetti i à roviné el colé che tèn la part sul mè plate, inscì che do dovréi indicà de torné in ogni mo, e lo vò pas dooooo, inscì.....

@la ié capisco la sensazion.
Àva avú en problema simila mentre i lavoré su la mè casa, indué literalment ogni datum che pensés de dopré fàva error.
Ié sté en contrattor che àva messo en cornice de la porta diritta e quadrata. Àva dovú tiré fora un paio de travi dopo che l'é andé via perché la porta àvèa de èsse come en degre de lēr per èsse a filo co la fossa e no fluttant in l'aria da 'n cant.
En àter (paret parzial) à cada trave cuidé che l'éra corta de lunghezza perché no do два su la stéssa misura... La fossa no l'é plana, inscì per fà el top de la cucina livel, te gh'é bisogn de la paret per èsse en parallelogram e no en rettangul

source_doc:
In a surprise Inspector Clouseau twist, I now have an extra thing to investigate for Spooky Kitties Sciences!
I was doing a quick scroll through the evenings secondary camera video, when I spotted a curious The Inspector standing on the trunk of the tree near the feeding station. Kept jumping around, finding him near where the magpies had been, so I initially suspect(edit) he was simply chasing them as they sometimes let him do, until I randomly chance stop...
#SpookyKittiesSciences

There Inspector Clouseau was, rolling around like crazing about 2 meters NE of the tree, mostly hidden by the unfortunate placement of the awnings east post. Still, there he was for 5 minutes, at which point he ran back up the tree, walked across the lawn to the hill, flattened himself at the bottom, and then ran off camera, presumably in the middle of The Zoomies.
2/
#SpookyKittiesSciences

Now, as some of my Spooky Kitties Sciences readers may know, the motivations behind that tests are not just to entertain the kitties. While the most important aspect is the genuine curiosity I had seeing the kitties rolling around in the snow, I really wanted to find something that The Inspector liked. I came out of the initial testing with only a single moment to hint that he liked something. What that was is still a mystery.
3/
#SpookyKittiesSciences

hypo_0:
In na surpraisa dal Inspector Clouseau, adess ai é na roba extra da investiger per i Spooky Kitties Sciences!
Stave per fa na scrollada svelta tra i video de la secundara camera, quande ai vëdü na curiosa The Inspector che stava sü la branca de l'arbre vicino al station de nutriment. Continüava a sautare, trouaend lu vicino ai magpies, per cui inicialmente vegna a pensà che lo steva simplement a seguil, come a l'àn alle volte, fin che a fermézan random...
#SpookyKittiesSciences

Y èra The Inspector Clouseau, che se rotolava come un mat sü de 2 meters NE de l'arbre, per la magior part nascosto da na posizion un pò disgraziada de i tende dal pòst est. Ancora, y éra lì per 5 minutes, al qual point a l'é corü trás l'arbre, éndé travers dle prato fin al col, s'é flattené a la fund, e po a l'é corü fòra da la camera, presummé in mes de The Zoomies.
2/
#SpookyKittiesSciences

Adess, come che chej de miei lettor de i Spooky Kitties Sciences sa, i motivs d'ste test i é no just per intrategner i gatt. Mentre che l'aspect pì important é la genuina curiosità che avevo vedén i gatt rotolá in la neve, a vöi davvero trové quelque cosa che The Inspector a jë piacié. Ai n’é scüda fora del test inizial cun solo un momento per indichè che j'é piaciü. Chel che j'é, l'é ancora un mistero.
3/
#SpookyKittiesSciences

Adess, come che chej de miei lettor de i Spooky Kitties Sciences sa, i motivi di ste test no i é solo per intrategner i gatt. Mentre che l'aspect pì important é la genuina curiosità che avevo vedén i gatt rotolá in la neve, a j'éra giusto un desiderio de trovà quelque cosa che a j'é piacié al The Inspector. Ai n’é scüda fora dal test inizial cun solo un momento per insinuà che j'é piaciü qualche cosa. Chel che j'é, l'é ancora un mistero.
3/
#SpookyKittiesSciences
hypo_5:
In na sorprendent svolta dal Inspector Clouseau, adess agh é na roba in più da investigà per i Spooky Kitties Sciences!
Stave facendo na scrollada veloce tra i video de la seconda camera de la sira, quande ai vëdü un curioso The Inspector che l'era sü la tronch de l'arbre vicino al station de nutriment. Continuava a saltà in giro, trouand lu vicino a do i magpies, per cui inizialmente pensava che lu steva a inseguì, come ale volte jé l'é permès, fin che a m'é fermà a cas...
#SpookyKittiesSciences

Là j'éra The Inspector Clouseau, che se rotolava come un mat a circa 2 meters NE de l'arbre, per la magior parte nascosto dalla maldestra posizion de i tende dal pòst est. Eppure, j'éra lì per 5 minutes, al che punto l’é corü indré sü l'arbre, éndé fin al col sul prato, s’é flattené a la fund, e po l’é corü fòra da la camera, presumibilmente in mes de The Zoomies.
2/

source_doc:
painting with bazkie! 🧵 a (slow) thread [1/x]
I figured it'd be fun to share the whole process that goes into making a painting a custom scene. could be useful to some, and entertaining to others :)
👩‍🦱 ~ EVE & ADAM ~ 🧔‍♂️
as you all know, I'm a deeply religious person 🛐 so..
the scene: we're in the garden of eden. adam is eating apples from the forbidden tree, because of course he is. eve is having none of his shit, grabs an unfortunate unsuspecting nearby serpent, and is about to whip the shit out of adam. 🐍
#painting

painting with bazkie! 🧵 a (slow) thread [2/x]
so, we're gonna need reference photos. I want eve to be in the process of swinging the serpent around; so then I figured a baseball batter would be a good fit.
so wading through the AI slop, I found this actual photo that has a nice pose and good lighting.

painting with bazkie! 🧵 a (slow) thread [3/x]
I want adam to be in a protective stance, while also holding a forbidden apple, and all this, seen from the side/back. also, the lighting has to come from the same side as the batter. so all and all, it's pretty hard to find a proper reference pic for this, so I am posing for this one myself.
took about 20 pics with slightly different in stances etc., and decided on this one. (the right hand is going to hold the apple)

hypo_0:
painté cun bazkie! 🧵 un (slòu) thrèd [1/x]
jò m'ò pensà che l'éra divertent de partì l'inter prucés che va a faré un painté un scena personalizèda. podëssa esser útil a quëi e divertent a àutri :)
👩‍🦱 ~ EVE & ADAM ~ 🧔‍♂️
co bà ne sà, jò êi na pèrsona profòndamènt religiósa 🛐 donc..
la scena: ne sum in giardé de l’eden. adam é de mangé pomes dal àrbore interdit, vìa é sà. eve é de nìe con la sò strònga, cata un serpent sventurà che l’é lì sie, e l'é pronta a dé te la frècia a adam. 🐍
#painté

painté cun bazkie! 🧵 un (slòu) thrèd [2/x]
è, avé n'oma de referénzia. vöi che eve én deré in prucés de giré il serpent; quëi jò m'ò pensà che un batté de baseball seria na bèna scelta.
dunumé travesè in tra'l cièrs dell'IA, jò ó trolà chësta foto reala che é na bela posiziun e na bona illuminazión.

painté cun bazkie! 🧵 un (slòu) thrèd [3/x]
vöi che adam é in na pòsiziun de proteção, mentre che țéa un pom interdit, e tot chësta, vèda de la sò side/dietro. anca, l'illuminazión deve vignì da la stesa side come il batté. quindi, per riassumé, é mé mò preònt da catà na bona pic de referénzia, e vöi che m'ò póse per chësta.
ô ò ciapà circa 20 fotòs cun posiziun un pò diferent etc., e m'ò decidì su chësta. (la mà dreta va a tegnì il pom)

$partner has a video consult with Ikea to quote for a fitted kitchen. It's a fascinating glimpse into the ecosystem of online services for boomers.
1. They send link for video consult, three weeks ago. It uses Ikea's proprietary videoconf solution
2. They request the designs & 3D renders for the new kitchen
3. they send an email saying "thanks for sending through the design
4. We dial in today, they start the call with "our system blocked your files, let's design your kitchen together"
1/x

5. Partner asks if there's any way to share the (very detailed, took us like a full man week to put together) designs, but the Ikea salesdrone is on a script, and isn't having a bar of it.
6. The next step in the script is "laboriously do the design from scratch over the phone with the client, hunting and pecking on the keyboard and not fast using the UI of their design software"
2/x

7. They cannot share their screen, so it's a clown show of repeated misunderstanding about which part of which image is being referred to

8. the clock has just ticked past what should have been the full consult, and they're 35% the way thru getting the required measurements.

9. So far there's been literally 8 minutes of salesdrone laboriously inputting the measurements supplied

source_doc:
Campanīle
A #poetry thread
i.
A Roman church belfry,
gold cross reaching for clouds:
bell tolls, sets brass note free,
sings out through misty shroud,
its high peal an appeal
to the faithful long gone.
No more piety’s zeal:
many sunsetted dawns.
Its stone tower keeps watch
through the mask of dusk-rain,
skies loosing their barrage
upon roof tiles again.
🧵👇🏼
#poem #poemaday #moody #neoclassical #church #night #photography

ii.
Who pulled on the bell cord?
Lone monk in his cloister
with none left in accord.
He, grain in church oyster —
yet no cell holds his bed,
no dust stirred by his shoes,
his name never was said,
no old books that he used.
The bell rope hangs, worn, frayed,
gnawed by church mice’s teeth.
It’s been long since it swayed,
pulled by hands underneath.
🧵👇🏼

iii.
The night wind whispers psalms
and breathes canticles’ chant
to swing the clapper of bronze,
I answer in descant —
but not with my own voice.
The wind swallows my call,
chimes its own holy noise
with the hands of its squall.
✋🏼🧵

Campanīle
Un #thread de poesia
i.
Un belfro de na glesia romana,
cros dorada che ciama ai nubes:
la campana sona, libera na nota de ottone,
canta fora de na vel de nebia,
la so alta sonada l'é na pregiera
ai fedè n'che jé n'andé.
Nò mehr zela de pietà:
many alba che j'én tramontà.
La so torre de pedra guarda
tra la maschera de la pluja creativa,
i ciel che lascëna la so barrera
su le tegole da n'ona volta ancora.
🧵👇🏼
#poesia #poemaday #umoristich #neoclassich #glesia #not #fotografia

ii.
Chi la tiré la corda de la campana?
Un monach solitari in so chiostro
senza nisciun con cui è in accord.
Lë, granel in na ostrica de glesia —
ma nò cella che têngia so lete,
nò polvere svegliada dai so scarp.
La so nòm mai l'é stada dit,
nò vieux libri che l'é druvé.
La corda de la campana l'é pendida, consuma,
rodida dai dent dei topi de glesia.
É passà un sac de temp che l'é dondolada,
tirada da man che l'é sú di sotto.
🧵👇🏼

iii.
El vento de la not sussura salmi
e respira il canto de cantiche
per muover el battente de bronz,
io rëspund in un contrapunto —
ma nò con la me própria vòce.
El vento ingoia la me invocazion,
canta el so propr de rumore santo
co le man del so temporale.
✋🏼🧵

El vento ingoia la me invocazion,
canta el so propr de rumore santo
co le man del so temporale.
✋🏼🧵
hypo_4:
Campanīle
Un #thread de poesia
i.
Un belfro de na glesia romana,
cros dorada che ciama ai nubes:
la campana sona, libera na nota de ottone,
canta fora de na vel de nebia,
la so alta sonada l'é na preghiera
ai fedè ch'én andà via.
Nò più zela de pietà:
tante alba ch'én tramontà.
La so torre de pedra guarda
tra la maschera de la pluja de vespro,
i ciel che liberëna la so furia
su le tegole da na volta ancora.
🧵👇🏼
#poesia #poemaday #umoristich #neoclassich #glesia #not #fotografia

ii.
Chi la tiré la corda de la campana?
Un monach solitari in so chiostro
senza nisciun che j'é in accord.
Lë, granel in na ostrica de glesia —
ma nò cella che têngia so lete,
nò polvere svegliada dai so scarp,
la so nòm mai l'é stada dit,
nò vieux libri che l'é druvé.
La corda de la campana l'é pendida, consuma,
rodida dai dent dei topi de glesia.
É passà un sac de temp che l'é dondolada,
tirada da man ch'é giò di sotto.
🧵👇🏼

iii.
El vento de la not sussura salmi
e respira el canto de cantiche
per muover el battente de bronz,
io rëspund in un contrapunto —
ma nò con la me pròpria vòce.
El vento ingoia la me invocazion,
canta el so propr de rumore santo
co le man del so temporale.
✋🏼🧵

source_doc:
and it's not a bad film — it's a spectacular-looking one in spots — but it is also a film entirely made out of other, better and more thematically cohesive films. so it's 2001 and the three-body problem and arrival and wall-e a little bit, but it's also Quips Sexyman Saves The World Part XVII and ultimately just not that lot

while watching i wondered why the earth needed to be in peril, and if the other two members of the multicultural crew dying to leave the White Man in charge was some kind of an anti-woke statement; but in light of some of the book author andy weir's 'most media literate libertarian' comments about how star trek should be just about spaceships going pew-pew, at least to him the answer is yes to the latter and 'fascism' to the former

@esvrld I read the book a little while back and I may have given him too much credit, especially given his recent decision to open his mouth, but I took the death of the international crew to strand the white boy as an understanding that his second book failed because he is not any good at writing people interacting with each other and his only skill is creating clever little puzzles for his self-insert to solve in complete isolation. Giving him an alien buddy was a good move because it opens the possibility of character interaction without requiring it to resemble the way humans relate to one another

hypo_0:
e l'é miga n film da sbaglié — l'é n film che à l'aria spettacolar en certi momént — ma l'é anca n film fata completament da àutri film, mej e piü coerent tematicament. l'é insomma 2001 e el problema di tre corpi e arrival e un po' wall-e, ma l'é anca Quips Sexyman Saves The World Part XVII e 'n fin l'é miga tant

mentre che l'öro guardé, m'ò domandé péra che la tera gëveva à sté in pericol, e se i àutri do membri de la crew multicultural che muoiven péra lascié el Bianch in caràg l'éra quache tipo de 'dichiarazion anti-woke'; ma in vista de quache comment d'el scrittor dal l'liber andy weir su che star trek duvëve éssere just de astronavi che 'pew-pew', almeno péra él la risposta é sì a quest'ultim e 'fascisma' a quel prim

@esvrld ò léct el liber 'na poc a d'là e pò t'ò puëdì 'nda' zé n gròss onur, soprattutto vista la sò decisiò recent de ve un po' da d'la boca, ma t'ò interpreté la mort de la crew internazional péra strandar el ragaz albi come 'na comprension che el sò secónd liber l'é failé perchè l'é miga bon a scrivé la gente che interagë àntra de l'ëra e el sò unic talent l'é créé n picul-puzle inteligent péra el sò inù a resolvé in completa isolazion. Darghe n amigh alien l'éra 'na bona mossa perchè l'öfa la possibilté d'interazion de personàg senza che l'é duvë fëssém somè de come i umans se comporten àntra de l'ëra

@esvrld ò léct el liber 'na poc a d'là e pò t'ò puëdì à gher 'nda' zé n gran onur, soprattutto vista la sò decisiò recente de ve 'n po' da d'la boca, ma t'ò interpreté la mort de la crew internazional péra strandar 'l ragazzi albi come 'na comprension che 'l sò secónd liber l'é falì perchè l'é miga bon a scrivé la gente che interagë àntra de l'ëra e el sò unic talent l'é créé n picul-puzle inteligent péra 'l sò inù a resolvé in completa isolazion. Darghe 'n amigh alien l'éra 'na bona mossa perchè l'öfa la possiblté d'interazion de personàg senza che l'é duvë fëssém somè de come i umans se comporten àntra de l'ëra

source_doc:
Good Morning Worlds!
We are going to the tip this morning. It will clear some of the stuff we sorted yesterday from the drive. I don't think we can clear it all unless we took the trailer, but the trailer is full of steel for weighing in.
Later I might carry on packing tote crates.
#GoodMorningWorlds

Tip trip done, and another car load cleared out.
I have taken the new trailer axle, and trailer drive motor system, out of the scrap metal trailer load. That means we can get more scrap metal in there and also not accidentally weigh in the parts I want to keep.
I think, next, I will start moving the scrap steel from the back garden into the trailer so that it is ready to go.
Scrap steel prices are not very high at the moment but better than nothing, if I take enough of it in one go.
Still have to sort the non-ferrous scrap.

That thing when you are taking the rotten tyres off small, wide lawn tractor wheels....
Huge effort to unmount one side of the tyre, but it was really badly rusted tight on the other side of the rim.
In the time it took me to break the bead free, I'd forgotten I had already done the other side, and ended up with the rim free but completely inside the tyre!
I had to remount the tyre that side, and then work around it to get the rim out.
I had to cut up the inner tube to get that out too!
I wonder how many more tyres I need to unmount? Four done so far.

hypo_0:
Bon De!
Stam a andé a la discarica chest matina. L'uma pulì via quela parte che avèm sistemà ieri dal camion. Nö pensé che podé pulì tot, a manchò che n'andé con la caravana, ma la caravana l'é pléna de metal per pesar.
Dopo, forsi continö a preparè i bugin.
#BonDe

Vià la discarica finida, e anca un'altra auto svuotada.
Ài tirà fora l'asse nova de la caravana e il sistema del motor dal camion di rumenta. Cheste vole dire che podèm metter ancor pì metal rumentoso e anca che no pesèm par accidental i pezzi che vöi tignì.
Pensè che tra poc, comencé a muover via il metal rumentoso dal giardin di drit per metterlo in caravana, accio che sia pronta.
I prezzi del metal rumentoso n'é miga altissimi al moment, ma e' mejo che nagott, se aiò inì abbastanza in un colpo.
Dovrè anca sistemé il metal non ferros.

Che sensazion qando t'cavi via i pneumàtics rott di picculi, largi tanf tarrà?!...
Un enorm sforz per svitare una parte dal pneumàtic, ma l'era belì stròfinà sul l'altro lado de la cerchia.
Nel témp che m'é volé per svincolà via la parte, m'era desmentegà che ài già fát l'altro lado, e finì con la cerchia libera ma completamente dentr al pneumàtic!
Dovrè rimontà il pneumàtic su chê lato, e po' lavurà intorna per tirà via la cerchia.
Dovrè anca tajar l'tub inter per metterlo via!
Me chiedo che altri pneumàtics ài da svitá? Quater feita fin adù.

source_doc:
right, so, as i was saying, i dmed this very well known and very friendly seeming artist-type person and gave em the usual spiel:
- how bridge works
- how to bridge
- please do so because i want to follow you and reblog some of your stuff that i like
- if you don't want to, that's fine
and they responded "not doing that" which is all well and good but then they blocked me???
just like, for absolutely no fucking reason

not naming any names because i do NOT dislike anybody involved and i certainly do not want to incite any brigading, but this has happened with several people now, including people who have REBLOGGED AND LIKED BRIDGED POSTS FROM THIS ACCOUNT (my main), which is WHY I WANTED TO FOLLOW THEM

if they had just said "no thanks" they would have gotten an "ok, perfectly understandable! :)" or the like from me, but now everyone has to put up with my confused ranting instead. i'm not even angry, i'm just *genuinely baffled*

bsky people, is this a genuine issue over on your platform (because it's one i've almost *never* had over here on this side of the bridge) or am i just running into bad apple after bad apple

I honestly don't know what people's general feelings are about enabling the Bridgy Fed here, because that's just not a topic that ever comes up tbh (unfortunately)… But there's definitely some subset of people here who are super trigger-happy about the block button, I'm not a fan of this either.

giust, insomma, come ié che disi, i à scrit a 'na persuna artistica che i é molto conossuda e che sembra molto amichevole e ghe i à dà 'l solit discors:
- come funziona 'l bridge
- come fa 'l bridge
- please fat 'l per che i voi seguit vi e repost qualche roba che mi plaja
- se no voi, va ben
e l'han rispost "no, no faro" che va ben, ma po' m'han bloccà???
a l'é simplament, per gnente motiv

no nòmmen nissun per che i NO i dislike' nò tüt che j'é impliçai e certament i vòi nagutz fa scatenar alcun brigad, ma chësta l'é capitada cun parechë person, inclüdant person che àn REBLOGAT E PIACIUD BRIDGED POST DA QUEST ACCOUNT (la me principal), chë l'é PER CHE I VULEVA SEGUI' LUR

se l'avessan dit "no grazia" l'avesse ricevüt 'n "ok, perfettamënt comprensibile! :)" o qualcosa del genere da me, ma adés tüt j'é da sopporté la me raègola confusa invez. i n'é nemm poc arrabié, i sô 'solt *genuinament confus*

source_doc:
I just had a very nice #dream that I made friends with Lee Chaeyeon. I just started talking to her nand the next thing I know, I have stayed over her house (like when the French kidnapped me for Christmas) and she is telling me to go up stairs and "shuffle up a little bit" (her English was generally excellent) by which she meant "tidy up a little bit" to show her mom we were ready to eat.
She comes upstairs to "shuffle up" her room and starts making gestures to explain what she means ...
1/

(she was always so excited to see me in this dream) because I was taking my coat off instead of "shuffling up."
Then she indicates this little piece of paper and says she has left me an autograph but in return she wants this little trading card I made in second grade of "50 Spikes," a sonic knock-off, obviously with more spikes. (This card actually exists IRL BTW). I start explaining to her what it is and if she really wants it (she did) I at least needed a picture of her holding it.
2/

Partly because I would miss it, but also, otherwise no one would believe me that she had wanted this thing from me.
It was then I realized we still didn't have each others' phone numbers.
3/3

Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Ladin, Val Badia, Italy grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Ladin, Val Badia, Italy. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Ladin, Val Badia, Italy translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Ladin, Val Badia, Italy (lld_Latn):
hypo_0:
Jë m’ëi gë stré damoin un bel #sogn chë mëi ài fat amic cun Lee Chaeyeon. Jë m’ëi cumenzé a parlé cun lëi e lë proch a chë n’ëi senté, jë ài resté a chë tën (cme quë i Francesch m’ëi tgné për Nadal) e lëi më rëcëta de jë šé a lë piani e "shuffle up un pôc" (lë ingles chë jë di qual éra bën brî). Chë le dīcë de "fâ un pôc de orden" par mostré a so mama chë jë érë prëst a mangià.
Chë lëi vëgn a lë piani par "shuffle up" la so camera e cumëza a fà gesti par spiegé chë lëi vëne ...
1/

(lëi éra sempre tantë entusiasta de vedë me in chë sogn) perché jë stëe tiré fora té lë giacche par “shuffle up.”
Après lëi vëgn par nësta pìça de carta e dîcë chë m’ëi lëvë un autograf, ma in cambi lëi vœj çëna pìca de trading card chë jë ài fat in seghunda classa de "50 Spikes," un knock-off sonor, ovviament cun më spike. (Chë sta card esistë realmente in IRL BTW). Jë cumëza a spiegé a lëi chë che jë l’è e s’i lëi vœj bal a vë a m’ëi necesitë pëna dla sô foto cun essa in man.
2/

Part de chë jë m’ëi scordé, ma anca, altrimenti nissun më crëda chë lëi vœj àn chë cha roba da me.
Ëra d’ëi m’ëi realizé chë n’ëi éra miga chë chë so nümër de telefon.
3/3

Ai gë stré damoin un bel #sogn chë m’ëi fat amic cun Lee Chaeyeon. Jë gë cumencë de parlar cun lëi e lë proch a chë n’ëi senté, lëi m’ëi rëcëta de chë jë šé a chë casa de lëi (cme quë i Francesch m’ëi tgné per Nadal) e lëi m’ëi dîcë de jë šé a lë piani e "fâ un pôc de orden" (lë ingles de lëi éra bën brî) par mostrà a so mama chë jë érë prëst a mangià.
Chë lë vëgn a lë piani par "fâ un pôc de orden" la so camera e cumëza a fà gesti par spiegé qué chë lëi vëne ...
1/

(lëi éra sempre tantë entusiasta de vedë me in chë sogn) perché jë stëe tiré fora té lë giacche par "fâ un pôc de orden."
Après lëi m'ëi mostra chë pîza de carta e dîcë chë m’ëi lëvë un autograf, ma in cambi lëi vœj chësta pîca de trading card chë jë ài fat in seghunda classa de "50 Spikes," un knock-off sonor, ovviament cun più spike. (Chë sta card esistë realmente in IRL BTW). Jë cumëza a spiegé a lëi chë chë l’è e s’i lëi vœj bal a vë a m’ëi necesitë almenë una foto de jë cun chë l’ëi in man.
2/

Part de chë jë m’ëi scordé, ma anca, altrimenti nissun më crëda chë lëi vœj àn chë cha roba da me.
Ëra d’ëi m’ëi realizé chë n’ëi éra miga chë chë so nümër de telefon.
3/3

source_doc:
Reading Gloria Steinem's undercover report on being a Playboy Bunny... finished Part I and damn🤔
Despite being well aware of Playboy being uh... a CORPORATION lol... had no idea how much their entire infrastructure truly served to perpetuate classism in an extremely creepy way while outwardly presenting themselves as the "classy" and thus "more ethical" option compared to say, Hustler

I'll post some screenshots later but to give you the gist, Bunnies (who were cocktail waitresses), had to:
- accept lower (by $200-150, equivalent to today's $2.5K) wages than advertised
- hand over 50% of all their tips
- give their last names to "Number 1 key holders" (ergo, celebrities/elites) if asked
- be subjected to a pelvic exam and blood test but weren't allowed to pick the physician
- be spied on by a private eye
- go out if their way to hide their husbands/bfs

The central point that unites all of this:
Bunnies were STRICTLY NOT ALLOWED TO (penalized by termination) date any other employees or customers... BUT accompanying and dating the "Number 1 key holders" was permitted, if not encouraged. See where this is going?

New recruits were given a "Bunny Bible" to study all those bizarre rules and instructions from.
To mention a few more:
- Bunnies' work performance was assessed by a "merit system" (YES, that exact wording!) instead of being written up. Unsurprisingly, merit was not only judged by a good work ethic but also very specific requirements on looks and attitude.
- there was an incentive system in place that rewarded Bunnies who sold the most liquor and merchandise

hypo_0:
Legendo el raport undercover de Gloria Steinem su de èssere una Playboy Bunny... fì finì la Part I e cavolo🤔
Malgrè che jë sii ben conscia de che Playboy è eh... na CORPORATION lol... n’avei nè idea de quant che lò tutta l'infrastruttura jë serveva a perpetuar el classismo in na manera estremamènt creepy, mentr'che se presentan come l’opzion "classy" e quindi "più etica" rispetto a, che ne sò, Hustler

Poste jë farò qualchi screenshot, ma per dàve na idea, le Bunnies (che jë eram nelle cocktail) dovevan:
- accettar stipendi più baji (de $200-150, equivalenti ai $2.5K de adè) de che jë era pubblicità
- consegnar el 50% de toti i lor tips
- dar i lò cognomi ai "Number 1 key holders" (cioè, celebrità/elites) se richiesti
- èsser sottoposte a un esame pelvico e test del sangue ma no jë permetteva de sceglier el dotor
- èsser spiate da un detective privato
- fì fati a nasconder i sò marì o bf

El punt central che unì tüt chë:
Le Bunnies jë eran STRETTAMÈNT PROIBÌ DE (penalizè da la terminazion) frequentar altri impiegà o clienti... MA acompañar e sté con i "Number 1 key holders" l’era permèss, se no incoragià. Vëdi dove chë stà andè?

Jë neòvi reclute jë vegniven dat un "Bunny Bible" da studié tüt chë regole e istruzioni bizzarre.
Per menzioné qualchi altra:
- la prestazion lavorativa de le Bunnies jë era valutà tramite un "sistema de merito" (SÍ, proprio quela formulazion!) invez de jë scritè. Nò sorprendentemente, el merito no jë era giudicà solo d’na buna etica de lavoro ma anca da requisiti molto specifici su look e atteggiamento.
- jë era n’ sistema d’incentivi in atto che premiava le Bunnies che vendeven el più de liquor e merce

source_doc:
project move out, spring break relay
day 1:
Cleared main bedroom closet
& contents of boxes on one wall.
I'm surveying all my belongings. Pulling out a small percentage to save. Sentimental items. Practical pieces for putting together a new life. At this stage I know I'm selecting more than I need, probably more than I can carry; but the amount that I'm leaving behind is far greater. Deciding what to keep & where comes after the survey. All the rest will be turned over to "scavengers."
#moverR

Day 2, midday break, Monday.
Today is harder than yesterday. I'm uncovering far more "sentimental" stuff. The challenge: these saved memories are a physical drag that impair rather than contribute anything practically to my future AND I feel integrated looking at them. There's a strong general condemnation, I feel, of holding onto sentimental items. Yet I know that they are powerful. But hey, I'm an artist. Even wistful, sad memories are valuable to me. I'm proceeding as before, retaining less+

+than I'm tossing, while knowing that I am keeping "too much." The next phase will be the actual moving & storing phase when more might be cut. This phase is the pre-screen before turning the cleared items over to others who will take everything away.
File under: how to move out of a home of 12 years & a home town of 45 years, with family roots here (& artifacts) from 150 years. I'm finally leaving, in search of a culture that suits my values.
#moverR

dì 1:
Chëra l'armadur principal de la càmera
& cuntenuti de le scatole su 'na parete.
Stò survejand tüt i mè pertenen, tirand fora 'na pichëna percentaj da salvà. Oggetti sentimentali. Pezzi pratici per metter insèma 'na nova vita. A chësta fase, so chë m'ëi chëdë 'l pù che mi servë, probablamënt pù de chë che podëi portà; ma l'amont chë lëi a dree è lë pù grând. Decidë che tégnë & duë chë dá s'un pòs da 'na befò. Tüt l'ist l'è da dé a "cercatôrs."
#moverR

Dì 2, pausa de mezdi, lunedì.
Incö l'è pù düra che ier. Stò scoprënd l'var più "sentimentali". La sfida: chëi ricordi salvà a son 'na pesë d'oggetti che fà più danno che bón a la mía futura E më sentë integrà guardand lë. L'ë 'na forta condenà general, a mò 'l mà, de tégnë inne oggetti sentimentali. Però so che i son puissanti. Ma ehi, són 'n artist. Anca i ricordi tristi e nostalgici a son valùzi par mè. Stò andand avanti come prima, tratëntënp menos+

+de chë che getë, sapiand che stò tégnë "tropp." La prossima fase sarà la fase vera de trasloc & de depot mè, quënd chë pù di nen podëi èss rëti. Chësta fase l'è l'anteprima prima dèk dar l'oggetti chë sò liber ai àtri che li porteran via.
Classificà sous: comë traslocà da 'na cà de 12 agn & 'na cità de 45 agn, cun radìs familiars chë da 150 agn. Stò finalmente partë, in cerca d'una cultura che s'adatta ai mè valori.
#moverR

source_doc:
I just saw Kendall Coyne Schofield in her jersey during warmups... is she playing today??? 🤩
#PWHL #hizzackySeason BOS at MIN

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
Whatever Heise did to put a Fleet player on her butt at center ice, that Fleet player paid back HARD 10 seconds later. Yeesh. 😬🫣
On the one hand, I want the Fleet's goalie's PWHL debut to go well, but on the other hand, I want the Frost to win.
Kendall Coyne Schofield was PISSED at the front of the net with that little stick scramble after the Fleet's second goal. I'm glad to have her fury back on the ice. She is ferocious!

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
Looks like Klees changed back to his regular first line and Kendall et al needed to get a MFing goal and they got that hot damn MF goal! YES

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
YES! THEY TIED THAT SHIT UP!
Nooooooo, the Fleet is back up.
Roller-coaster of a game, here!

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
Wowza, Fleet is *still* gunning for Heise. Yee-ouch. That's two Fleet penalties to that one center-ice unpenalized shove by Heise.

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
It is so so good to see Kendall Coyne Schofield parked back at the top of the crease, getting shoved around by women a head taller than her, yet pushing right back, making plays.

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
Crowd is not convinced from what we saw that Curl deserved a double minot for roughing.
Crowd is not happy about this illegal hit call against Fleet on 71's injury.
I don't think we got a single SOG in that last power play.
Boston's defense is just too good. They aren't giving us any openings.

hypo_0:
Ai appena visti Kendall Coyne Schofield con la so maglia durant i riscaldament... al gioca ancoi??? 🤩
#PWHL #hizzackySeason BOS at MIN

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
Quelo che Heise à fait per metter un giocador de Fleet a la scena al center, quelo giocador de Fleet à fatto un gros ritorno 10 second dopo. Uff. 😬🫣
Da na part, vöi che la debùt de PWHL de la portera de Fleet va bën, ma da l'altra part, vöi che la Frost vince.
Kendall Coyne Schofield era INCAVOLADA davanti al net con quel picen tumulto de baston dopo il second goal de Fleet. A gò content de veder la so rabbia torna in ghiaccio. L’è feroc!

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
Par che Klees è tornà indré a la so linea de prima e Kendall e compagnia gh'avein bisogno de un goal MFing e l'àn avü quel bot de hot damn MF goal! YES

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
YES! AN TIES I CHE STRONZ!
Nooooooo, la Fleet è tornà a an dara.
En montagna russa de partìda, qui!

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
Wowza, la Fleet l'è *ancora* in cerca de Heise. Yee-ouch. Iè do penalità per la Fleet per un colpo non penalizà de Heise al center-ice.

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
É tant bël veder Kendall Coyne Schofield parchedata in cima al net, sbatuda da donne più alte de lé, ma che torna a rispondere, mettendo in scena.

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
La folla non è convinta de quel che g'avèn visti che Curl meretava un doppio minot per roughing.
La folla non è contenta de quel chiamata de colpo illegale contro la Fleet per l'infortunio al 71.
Non credo che avèn gió un singul SOG in quell'últim power play.
La difesa de Boston l’è semplicemente troppa bǽ. Non ne danno nissuna apertura.

source_doc:
And being one of the weirdo, we just frequently get attacks here and there. Either online, offline, or even from your closest people. Those attacks usually stem from homophobia, transphobia, or sometimes just, don't like how weird we are and how weird we act, especially furries that do deeper immersions like roleplaying and therianthropy.

Hence some of us got safety by not needing to tell who we are and where we were from. Some of us got safety by only revealing ourselves to our friends or close friends. Face/body reveal is a culture that most of the furries did at least once in a private post, whether it be "delete soon" kind of post or in story.

Despite being so, we're still open for social interactions offline. We do furmeets—a personal meeting between furries, be it in a group or personal, be it in an event or just casually—and sometimes making a con/fur on, such as MWFF, IWAG, PAWAI, FURUM, and so on. It's fun to meet them offline, get to know each other, be able to see them in person as most of us have never seen each other's faces, take a photo to keep personally and censor publicly, laugh together and discuss similar interests, and so on. It's fun, social, and warm.

Although, things don't feel the same today. As people start trying to strip anonymity of people, attack furries, therian, LGBTQIA, and dox them, as how also our community participate and stir the dramas inside, things has been a little more chaotic, less warm, and less feeling like community or family. It's not the same anymore.

Part of me hopes things can return to how it feels in the 2000s and 2010s, but, I'll just let God do the rest. I'm a little hopeless in society and humans. I'm tired of how things get worse and meant to attack and divide small communities into a hopeless being. I don't like how society is now no longer respecting and being in unity.

Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Ladin, Val Badia, Italy grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Ladin, Val Badia, Italy. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Ladin, Val Badia, Italy translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Ladin, Val Badia, Italy (lld_Latn):
hypo_0:
E iè d'un di bizzarri, i nòs avè d'ün attacch che se fa spess chì e là. Online, offline, o anca da i nòs rié. Ches attacch i ven di solito da omofobia, transfobia, o a volta, a l'àn dene chëi bizzarri che sèm e chëi bizzarri che i fà, specialmenti furries che fà immersion profonda come drammatizazion e therianthropia.

Perciò, certi da no i à d'sicurezza senza avé dè chëi ch'é e da indó che i ven. Certi da no i à d'sicurezza anca tra i nòs amis o amis stret. La rivelazion facci/bodi l'é na cultura che la màgrana di furries à fat almanch once in ün post privat, sën che sia "da cenc' sü" o in stòria.

Nonostante che sia cussì, i è ancor aperti a interazions social offline. I fà furmeets—na riunión personal tra furries, che sia in grupp o personal, che sia in üna manifestazion o sa semplament così—e a volta i fà un con/fur, come MWFF, IWAG, PAWAI, FURUM, e cussì. L'é divertent anghe a incontrè jë offline, conóscerci, vedèj in persona sorattutto che la màgrana di no i à mai vedù l'un l'autre in faccia, fà na foto da conservé personalmente e cénsür pubblicament, ridè insieme e discutè interess simil, e cussì. L'é divertent, social, e càld.

Nonostante, le co se senten minga p'asgò d'üra. Come la zente comença a prové a toglie l'anonimato di genti, attacchè furries, therian, LGBTQIA, e fà dox, come che anca la nòs comunity l'è parte e crea drama di dentro, le co i en un pò p'ün föi più chaotic, mèso càld, e mèso sentì la comunità o la famiglia. L'è pü la stesso com al dé.

Na part de me spera che le co pò tornè a cussì com se sentiva nei 2000 e 2010, ma, a lascerò al Signur de fà al rest. I son un pò disperat in società e umani. I è stanch de come le co i diventa più brüt e i gà d'attacchè e dividè piccole comunità in na cretina disperada. I n'm piäc cume società l'é adess più coletà e più stà insiem.

L'è pü la stesso com al dé.

Na part de me spera che le co pò tornè a cussì com se sentiva nei 2000 e 2010, ma, a lascerò al Signur de fà al rest. I sun un pò disperat in società e umani. I è stanch de come le co i diventa più brüt e i gà d'attacchè e dividè piccole comunità in na cretina disperada. I n'm piäc cume società l'é adess più coletà e più stà insiem.
